summary: Frontend-only testing of Indirect Cost Management integrated into Accounts Board. All 7 test scenarios passed for both Accountant and Super Admin roles. The Expense tab in Cashbook has been successfully split into 'Income', 'Direct Expense', and 'Indirect' sub-tabs. The Indirect tab shows all indirect cost management data with full CRUD capability inline.

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility issue

action_items: Minor: Add aria-describedby attribute to DialogContent in IndirectExpenseSection for accessibility compliance

test_credentials.super_admin: Demo Access -> Super Admin (admin@constructionos.com) - Rajesh Kumar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Indirect Cost Management is fully integrated into the Accounts Board under Cashbook. The Indirect tab has 3 view modes: Expenses (default with status filter cards and table), Budget Overview (portfolio summary and project-wise budget), and Allocations (auto-distribution history). All CRUD operations (create via 'Add Indirect Cost' button) are working. Both Accountant and Super Admin roles have access.

steps: Login via Demo Access -> Accountant
Navigate to Accounts Board -> Cashbook
Verify 3 sub-tabs exist: Income (1), Direct Expense (1), Indirect
Click Indirect tab
Verify Expenses view is default with status filter cards (All, Pending, Approved, Confirmed, Rejected)
Verify indirect costs table shows entries with category, description, vendor, amount, status badges
Click Budget Overview button
Verify portfolio summary cards appear (Portfolio, 20% Indirect Budget, Indirect Spent, Remaining)
Verify project-wise budget table with 80/20 rule breakdown
Click Allocations button
Verify Auto-Distribution History table appears with allocation entries
Click 'Add Indirect Cost' button
Verify dialog opens with form fields: Category, Amount, Description, Payment Method, Vendor, Invoice #, Invoice Date, Remarks
Verify 'Submit for Approval' button present
Close dialog
Click Direct Expense tab
Verify expense filter buttons (All, Material, Labour, Petty Cash, Other)
Verify expense table present
Login as Super Admin via Demo Access
Navigate to Accounts Board -> Cashbook -> Indirect
Verify all 3 view modes work (Expenses, Budget Overview, Allocations)
Verify Add Indirect Cost dialog opens with all form fields
Super Admin sees unmasked values (amounts visible without click-to-reveal)
